milestones.name: Project frame + receiver contract
milestones.goal: Lock the Linear/project shape, source-of-truth split, OTLP receiver scope, and dogfood success criteria before implementation sprawl begins.
acceptance: Project packet, PRD draft, issue map, dependency spine, labels/views, and status template exist.
OTLP receiver v0 is explicitly metrics-first and supports /v1/metrics over HTTP/protobuf.
P1 traces/logs/proxy features are named but not allowed to inflate MVP.

milestones.name: OTLP metrics receiver walking skeleton
milestones.goal: Prove the end-to-end ingest spine from local OTLP HTTP/protobuf request to normalized metric summaries and safe failure records.
acceptance: Deno backend listens on localhost for POST /v1/metrics.
Valid protobuf metric exports decode into ResourceMetrics → ScopeMetrics → Metric → DataPoint records.
Bad content type, malformed protobuf, oversize payloads, and decode failures produce visible safe failures.

milestones.name: Reactive telemetry substrate
milestones.goal: Build the live in-memory substrate that dashboards project instead of parsing raw OTLP trees directly.
acceptance: Normalized metric store supports bounded retention and ring-buffer eviction accounting.
Derived metric engine computes latest, rate, deltas, and histogram percentile estimates where possible.
Live bus batches updates so UI never rerenders per datapoint.

milestones.name: Docked inspector dashboard
milestones.goal: Ship the side-panel inspector UX with overview cards, charts, explorer, filters, pause/resume, and clear empty/degraded states.
acceptance: Docked Sheet/ResizablePanel inspector can attach beside the app and expand to full dashboard mode.
Overview renders latency, throughput, error, active request, ingest, and dropped-point state.
Metrics Explorer can filter by service/resource/metric/attribute and open metric detail.

milestones.name: Safe payload inspect + debug fixtures
milestones.goal: Make raw telemetry inspectable enough to trust and debuggable enough to improve, without turning payloads into secret soup.
acceptance: Payload Inspector traces every dashboard point back to decoded resource/scope/metric/datapoint context.
Redaction policy hides sensitive attributes and reports what was hidden.
Redacted fixture export exists for ingest, decode, high-cardinality, redaction, and chart-derivation failures.

milestones.name: Dogfood packaging + acceptance evidence
milestones.goal: Package the Deno desktop app for local dogfood and assemble the evidence bundle that proves the MVP claims.
acceptance: Deno desktop build runs with explicit network/file permissions and documented localhost receiver posture.
Golden fixtures, UI snapshots, redaction tests, and acceptance matrix are current.
Project can close or promote follow-on traces/logs/proxy work without hiding unfinished MVP evidence.

issues.title: Establish Linear project packet and source-of-truth split
issues.goal: Create the project packet, PRD draft, issue map, dependency spine, and evidence folders using the Linear Method shape.
acceptanceCriteria: Project packet exists
no new initiative is created unless explicitly promoted
docs distinguish Linear execution docs from durable project-library canon.

issues.title: Define OTLP receiver v0 contract
issues.goal: Specify the v0 receiver contract: metrics-first OTLP/HTTP protobuf on localhost, /v1/metrics only, with traces/logs as P1 placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: Receiver contract doc names accepted paths, content types, payload limits, error categories, and non-goals.

issues.title: Scaffold Deno desktop shell and UI/backend bridge
issues.goal: Create the Deno desktop app shell with a backend receiver process and React/shadcn dashboard canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: App opens as desktop shell
backend can publish synthetic telemetry summaries to UI
permissions are explicit.

issues.title: Generate OTLP protobuf TypeScript types
issues.goal: Add protobuf codegen or generated TypeScript bindings for OTLP metrics export requests/responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated types decode fixture ExportMetricsServiceRequest payloads
codegen command is documented
generated files are reproducible.

issues.title: Implement POST /v1/metrics receiver
issues.goal: Implement localhost OTLP HTTP/protobuf receiver for metric exports.
acceptanceCriteria: Valid metrics payload returns success
wrong method/path/content-type produce explicit failures
no traces/logs accepted in v0.

issues.title: Normalize ResourceMetrics into metric series records
issues.goal: Transform decoded ResourceMetrics/ScopeMetrics/Metric/DataPoint trees into normalized series keys and datapoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Gauge, sum, histogram, and exponential histogram shapes have typed normalized forms
unknown data is preserved as safe metadata.

issues.title: Implement bounded ingest ring buffer
issues.goal: Store recent normalized datapoints and export metadata in bounded memory with eviction/drop accounting.
acceptanceCriteria: Buffer bounds are configurable
eviction increments dropped counters
safe inspect can show retained vs dropped counts.

issues.title: Add ingest failure and partial success model
issues.goal: Create stable failure categories for decode, content type, payload size, malformed metric, and redaction-blocked cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Failures include endpoint, payload metadata, stopped-before-store state, and next safe action
failures are snapshot-tested.

issues.title: Build metric derivation engine
issues.goal: Compute latest value, rate, deltas, datapoints/sec, ingest bytes/sec, and service/route aggregates from normalized points.
acceptanceCriteria: Derived values are deterministic from fixtures
missing temporality/unit data is labeled instead of guessed.

issues.title: Estimate histogram percentiles safely
issues.goal: Derive p50/p95/p99 from explicit histogram buckets and label approximations honestly.
acceptanceCriteria: Percentile estimates match fixture buckets
UI can mark estimates as bucket-derived
absent buckets show unavailable state.

issues.title: Add HTTP semantic metric presets
issues.goal: Recognize common HTTP metric names such as request duration and active requests and map them into first-class dashboard cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard presets activate only when matching metrics exist
missing duration/active request metrics produce clear empty states.

issues.title: Implement live bus batching and downsampling
issues.goal: Push telemetry summaries to the UI on a controlled cadence instead of every datapoint.
acceptanceCriteria: UI update cadence is configurable
high ingest rate does not freeze dashboard
downsampling is visible in safe inspect.

issues.title: Design and implement Overview cards
issues.goal: Create KPI cards for request rate, p95 latency, error rate, active requests, ingest rate, and dropped datapoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards render healthy, empty, paused, degraded, and stale states
each card links to metric/payload source context.

issues.title: Implement live charts for latency, throughput, errors, and ingest health
issues.goal: Use shadcn Chart/Recharts primitives for live Area/Line/Bar/Composed charts with time-window controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Charts support 1m/5m/15m windows
tooltips show source metric and aggregation
charts degrade gracefully when series are missing.

issues.title: Implement Metrics Explorer table and filters
issues.goal: Build searchable/filterable metric series explorer with service/resource/metric/attribute controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Explorer shows metric name, type, unit, latest, rate/delta, resource, cardinality, last seen, and status.

issues.title: Implement decoded Payload Inspector
issues.goal: Build tree/table view from export history → resource metrics → scope metrics → metric → datapoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Payload inspector can open the decoded source for any selected chart point
raw protobuf body remains off by default.

issues.title: Add pause/resume/clear controls
issues.goal: Add live pause, resume, clear session, and time window controls to the inspector.
acceptanceCriteria: Paused state freezes charts without stopping receiver unless configured
clear session requires confirmation and records action.

issues.title: Implement redaction and sensitive attribute policy
issues.goal: Add deterministic redaction for credentials, cookies, tokens, API keys, secrets, and high-risk attribute names/values.
acceptanceCriteria: Safe inspect and payload inspector never show sensitive values by default
redaction report includes hidden counts and patterns.

issues.title: Make raw payload capture explicit opt-in
issues.goal: Design raw protobuf/body capture as disabled by default with visible privacy posture and retention limits.
acceptanceCriteria: Raw capture cannot be enabled silently
UI labels raw capture state
export redacts or refuses unsafe raw data.

issues.title: Export redacted debug fixtures
issues.goal: Create fixture export for ingest, decode, derivation, redaction, and UI reproduction cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Fixtures include contract, endpoint, decoded summary, failure category, redaction report, reproduction steps, and expected behavior.

issues.title: Persist optional session history to SQLite
issues.goal: Add optional local SQLite retention for export metadata and normalized summary records.
acceptanceCriteria: Persistence is off or bounded by default
retention policy is visible
delete/clear works and is tested.

issues.title: Add proxy-forward mode design spike
issues.goal: Design non-MVP proxy mode where app → inspector → upstream collector while preserving OTLP semantics and showing upstream failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Decision doc clarifies MVP exclusion or P1 scope
proxy does not block dogfood packaging.

issues.title: Scaffold traces tab as P1 placeholder
issues.goal: Reserve UI and data model seams for /v1/traces without accepting trace payloads in MVP.
acceptanceCriteria: Traces tab is visibly coming-soon/P1
no fake trace data
architecture doc names required future work.

issues.title: Scaffold logs tab as P1 placeholder
issues.goal: Reserve UI and data model seams for /v1/logs without accepting log payloads in MVP.
acceptanceCriteria: Logs tab is visibly coming-soon/P1
no fake log data
architecture doc names required future work.

issues.title: Package Deno desktop dogfood build
issues.goal: Produce a local dogfood Deno desktop build with documented receiver port, permissions, and supported platforms.
acceptanceCriteria: Build runs locally
status shows receiver endpoint
permissions are documented
packaging notes distinguish dev from release.

issues.title: Assemble acceptance evidence bundle
issues.goal: Collect fixtures, UI snapshots, redaction reports, performance notes, issue close status, and open follow-ons.
acceptanceCriteria: Acceptance matrix is complete
P0 claims have evidence
missing P1 work is filed as follow-on, not hidden.
